name: Motorcycle Holdings Limited
analysis: MTO's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 34% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$2.5400, stop A$2.2077, target A$2.8379 (0.90:1) — then trail it.
